headline: WeaveGrid, GM Advance Grid-Integrated EV Charging and Home Energy Programs
summary: WeaveGrid, a grid-edge orchestration software provider for electric utilities, is collaborating with GM Energy to support access to utility programs across the country. The collaboration is aligned with General Motors’ vehicle-to-grid (V2G) efforts and is designed to help eligible Chevrolet, GMC, and Cadillac EV drivers participate in utility programs that can help support a more […]

headline: Financial Executives International Announces 2026-2027 Board of Directors
summary: Financial Executives International (FEI), the association of choice for CFOs, CAOs, and other senior-level finance leaders, announced today the election of a new slate of executive officers and members of the Board of Directors for the fiscal year, effective July 1, 2026.

headline: General Motors (GM) Leads Canada In EV Sales While Factory ZERO Cuts 1,000 Jobs
summary: General Motors led Canadian auto sales in the first half of 2026, supported by strong demand for its electric vehicles. The company expanded automation at Detroit's Factory ZERO, adding 50 AI-powered robots. Labor groups criticized the move as over 1,000 workers were laid off at the plant. General Motors, listed as NYSE:GM, is drawing attention as it pairs a leading position in Canadian auto sales with an aggressive push into electric vehicles. The stock last closed at $77.85, with a gain...
